features: 【Important Notes Before Purchase】1. Do not fill the hot water bottle with water exceeding 70°C to avoid scalding; 2. Before use, always check the hot water bottle for leaks. If any leaks are found, please stop using it ! 3. Do not use directly on skin; use with a flannel cover.

【Safety & Lifespan of the Bottle】The hot water bottle with cover is made of high-quality natural rubber, which is sturdy and wear-resistant, with better thermal conductivity and longer insulation time. The recommended lifespan of a hot water bottle is 2 years. For safety reasons, please replace it every two years.

【Wide Mouth Anti-Leakage】The mouth of the wearable hot water bottle is wide enough to easily pour water into the bottle with a capacity of 1L. The bottle is designed with a spiral nibble to seal the bottle and prevent leakage. For safety, please hold the bottle vertically by the neck and pour hot water slowly to avoid spillage. It is recommended that you do not fill the bottle more than 2/3 of the way and that the water temperature is below 70°C.

【Cosy Plush Belt】The wearable hot water bottle is designed with a super soft double lining to keep your hands and waist warm at the same time. The belt is 118cm in length and is self-adjusting to fit all body shapes. The included plush pouch helps to retain heat inside the wrap around hot water bottle and also prevents burns from direct heat contact with the skin.

【Multifunctional Hot Water Bottle】It helps to relieve lower back pain, back pain, neck pain, shoulder pain, muscle aches and pains, menstrual cramps, tension, or sports injuries. Suitable for both adults and girls. You can also use the hot water bag filled with cold water or crushed ice to provide a hot compress for a child with a fever or to reduce swelling in a sprained ankle.

【Ideal Gift】Wrap around hot water bottle is one of the essential thermal products for homes, school, office, and other places. The hot water bottle gift set is an ideal Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, Christmas, Birthday, or New Year gift for your wife, girlfriend, friends, and colleagues.
description: Product Description To avoid water leakage and scalding, please read the instructions carefully. Heartwarming Designs Wide mouth design Easy to fill while preventing spills. Note：Before use, please tighten the cap, if there are leaks, do not use! Soft plush lining Prevents burns from direct contact with your skin With hand pockets Warms your waist and your hands at the same time High-quality rubber material Hot and cold for all seasons, suitable for office, home, school, and other places. Note：Water below 70 "C.
